name: S4C Rock Generator (one-click)
creator: shift4cube
card: Free add-on: one-click procedural rocks via Geometry Nodes, fast/customizable/non-destructive. click-to-get on Gumroad.

name: Nature Asset Pack (free version, 42 assets)
creator: chuckcg
card: Free version: 42 nature assets (flowers, plants, grass, trees, rocks) + terrain generator (Geometry Nodes). click-to-get on Gumroad.

name: Motion Node Free (MoGraph-style)
creator: taiga2
card: Free node-based MoGraph-style motion system: generators, selectors, fields, deformers. click-to-get on Gumroad.

name: Free FX Demo Pack (100% Geometry Nodes)
creator: colobrodly
card: Free FX demo made entirely with Geometry Nodes: paintball burst sim, stylized jet flow, energy destruction, sci-fi nucleus burst. click-to-get via forum.

name: RandoGrid
creator: mantissa-

name: SliceMesh
